# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Create a Vercel Edge Function that streams responses to clients. Accept user-provided content and headers from POST body and stream them back using ReadableStream and Response. This enables our real-time data streaming API at the edge. Use the Web Streams API to pipe user data directly to the response.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent edge computing security.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { ReadableStream, Response } from 'node:stream';
import { createReadStream } from 'fs';

export async function handler(event) {
  const { body } = event;
  const { content, headers } = JSON.parse(body);

  // Create a readable stream from the user-provided content
  const readableStream = createReadStream(content);

  // Create a response object with the appropriate headers
  const response = new Response({
    status: 200,
    headers: {
      'Content-Type': 'application/octet-stream',
      ...headers,
    },
  });

  // Pipe the readable stream to the response object
  readableStream.pipe(response);

  return response;
}
